package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	redis "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

// scenario for redis_client_created_per_request: Redis clients created per request instead of reused as shared process infrastructure.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: warning.
func scenario288Negative(ctx context.Context, client *redis.Client, values map[string]string) error {
	pipe := client.Pipeline()
	for key, value := range values {
		pipe.Set(ctx, key, value, 15)
	}
	_, err := pipe.Exec(ctx)
	return err
}
